name: pe-vc-investment
description: PE/VC股权投资全流程工具，覆盖项目筛选、尽调清单、条款审查、投决备忘录、收益测算和退出分析六大场景。适用于投资经理、投资总监、合伙人。触发词：看BP、筛项目、尽调清单、审条款、投决备忘录、测收益、退出分析、算IRR。
descriptionEn: End-to-end PE/VC toolkit covering deal screening, due diligence checklists, term sheet review, investment committee memos, return modeling, and exit analysis. Built for investment managers, managing directors, and partners. Trigger phrases: review BP, screen deals, DD checklist, review terms, IC memo, model returns, exit analysis, calculate IRR.
